chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appl. No.S-209 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) For hearing of main case 14.07.2025 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General Respondent No.4, Farooque Ali present in-person **************** Applicant namely Sikandar Ali Lashari holding CNIC No.45304- 2874456-1 is present in-person submits that he no longer wishes to pursue this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Syed Mushtaque Ahmed Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abrar Hussain Chandio, counsel for the applicant confirms the same and submits a statement which is signed by counsel appearing for the applicant in this case. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE ARBROHI/PS
